channel.title: Harun's Daily Briefing
channel.description: A personal daily news briefing covering AI and tech, business and markets, marketing and DTC, and world news.
channel.itunes:author: Harun
channel.itunes:summary: A personal daily news briefing covering AI and tech, business and markets, marketing and DTC, and world news.

item.title: May 28, 2026 — Anthropic Mythos flags 23K flaws, Hungary flips, Shopify $100B
item.description:
Today's briefing: • Anthropic's Claude Mythos flags 23,000+ critical security vulnerabilities before public release • Hungary ends 16 years of Orbán rule; Péter Magyar wins election • Shopify posts second consecutive $100B+ GMV quarter; DTC retention crisis deepens • Fed on hold, ECB pauses, Bank of England signals cut; oil elevated on Iran tensions • Japanese researchers find vitamin K compound may regenerate brain neurons
Sections: 00:00 Open 01:00 AI & Tech 12:00 World News 16:00 DTC & Ecommerce 20:00 Markets 21:00 Science
item.itunes:author: Harun

item.title: May 27, 2026 — Anthropic agents live, OpenAI hits 25B, Trump-Xi summit results
item.description:
Today's briefing: • Anthropic ships managed agents with dreaming, outcomes, and multiagent orchestration, plus ten finance vertical agents • Trump-Xi Beijing summit wraps with limited concrete commitments on trade and tariffs • OpenAI Instant Checkout converts at 18% for Shopify merchants inside ChatGPT • Fed holds 8-4, ECB holds, Australia hikes third consecutive time; oil elevated on Hormuz risk • Tandem perovskite solar cells hit 34% efficiency, reshaping data center energy economics
Sections: 00:00 Open 00:45 AI and Tech 11:00 World News 15:30 DTC and Ecommerce 19:00 Markets 21:00 Science
item.itunes:author: Harun

item.title: May 26, 2026 — Anthropic finds 10K flaws, OpenAI files for IPO, Hungary resets
item.description:
Today's briefing: • Anthropic's Claude Mythos finds over ten thousand critical security vulnerabilities in major software • OpenAI files confidential IPO prospectus targeting up to one trillion dollars valuation • Hungary's Peter Magyar sworn in as PM, ending sixteen years of Orban rule • US-Iran blockade diplomacy keeps energy markets elevated; S and P five hundred hits record highs • Nanoparticles reverse Alzheimer's symptoms in mice in a first-of-kind dual-mechanism study
Sections: 00:00 Open 00:45 AI and Tech 11:00 World News 17:00 DTC and Ecommerce 21:00 Markets 23:30 Science 25:30 Close
item.itunes:author: Harun

item.title: May 25, 2026 — Anthropic agents JV, Orban falls, Shopify x ChatGPT live
item.description:
Today's briefing: • Anthropic launches Claude Managed Agents and a one point five billion dollar enterprise JV with Blackstone and Goldman Sachs • Hungary ends sixteen years of Orban as Peter Magyar wins in a landslide with major EU and Ukraine implications • Shopify x ChatGPT integration goes live, creating a new transactional commerce channel • Fed and ECB both hold, Brent crude at one hundred and five dollars, Treasury yields at four point five six percent • Tandem perovskite solar cells hit thirty-four percent efficiency, rewriting clean energy economics
Sections: 00:00 Open 00:45 AI and Tech 11:15 World News 17:00 DTC and Ecommerce 20:30 Markets 22:00 Science
item.itunes:author: Harun

item.title: May 24, 2026 — Meta AI flagship, Iran energy shock, DTC AI traffic
item.description:
Today's briefing: • Meta launches Muse Spark, its first flagship model under Alexandr Wang's Superintelligence Labs • Iran conflict becomes a global energy shock, reshaping inflation and central bank policy • AI referral traffic up 1,200% — tracking it is now urgent for ecommerce brands • Fed holds at 8-4 vote split; gasoline up 52% since Iran conflict escalated • Nanoparticles reverse Alzheimer's symptoms in mice — a different mechanism than prior attempts
Sections: 00:00 Open 01:15 AI & Tech 11:00 World News 15:30 DTC & Ecommerce 19:00 Markets 21:45 Science
item.itunes:author: Harun

item.title: May 23, 2026 — OpenAI files for IPO, agents go enterprise, D T C at a crossroads
item.description:
Today's briefing: • OpenAI confidentially files for IPO targeting one-trillion-dollar valuation • US and China meet in Beijing; Iran blockade disrupts global energy markets • Shopify launches agentic storefronts dashboard; AI referral conversions up 1200% • Equities strong on 15% earnings growth; Fed on hold, BoJ hiking • Tandem perovskite solar cells hit 34% efficiency, a new world record
Sections: 00:00 Open 00:45 AI and Tech 10:30 World News 15:00 DTC and Ecommerce 18:30 Markets 20:30 Science
item.itunes:author: Harun

item.title: May 22, 2026 — Anthropic's zero-day AI, Trump-Xi deals, AI shopping surge
item.description:
Today's briefing: • Anthropic's Claude Mythos autonomously finds thousands of zero-days in every major OS and browser • Trump-Xi Beijing summit produces 27 billion dollars in trade commitments amid disputed details • AI shopping referrals up 1,200% — now a real acquisition channel for DTC brands • Nvidia posts record 81.6 billion dollar quarter, up 85% year over year • Tandem perovskite solar cells hit 34% efficiency, resetting clean energy math
Sections: 00:00 Open 00:45 AI & Tech 11:30 World News 16:00 DTC & Ecommerce 19:30 Markets 21:00 Science
item.itunes:author: Harun

item.title: May 21, 2026 — Anthropic's secret model, Iran blockade, SpaceX IPO
item.description:
Today's briefing: • Anthropic releases Claude Mythos, its most powerful model, with access restricted to a cybersecurity consortium • US naval blockade of Iran extended indefinitely, Brent crude near one hundred and twenty dollars per barrel • Shopify Agentic Storefronts go live on ChatGPT and Gemini, enabling direct purchases from AI interfaces • Nvidia beats Q1 estimates; SpaceX files for a seventy-five billion dollar IPO at a one point seven five trillion dollar valuation • Astronomers confirm 118 new exoplanets using machine learning on NASA satellite data
Sections: 00:00 Open 00:45 AI & Tech 09:30 World News 14:30 DTC & Ecommerce 19:00 Markets 22:00 Science
item.itunes:author: Harun

item.title: May 20, 2026 — Meta's Muse Spark, Trump-Xi summit, Fed's Warsh era begins
item.description:
Today's briefing: • Meta debuts Muse Spark, first AI model from Superintelligence Labs under Alexandr Wang • Trump-Xi Beijing summit produces soybean and Boeing deals, Taiwan warning remains sharp • AI shopping referral conversions up over 1,200 percent — the channel is now real • Kevin Warsh takes Fed helm, 30-year yield tops 5 percent, rate cuts off the table • First commercial orbital outpost launches this month as private space era begins
Sections: 00:00 Open 00:40 AI and Tech 09:40 World News 13:40 DTC and Ecommerce 17:20 Markets 19:45 Science
item.itunes:author: Harun

item.title: May 19, 2026 — Anthropic tops OpenAI, Iran oil spike, DTC CAC crisis
item.description:
Today's briefing: • Anthropic in talks to raise fifty billion dollars at a valuation topping OpenAI, plus ten new financial services agents • Trump heads to Beijing for first US presidential visit to China since twenty seventeen • DTC customer acquisition costs up forty to sixty percent — first-order economics are broken • Fed holds eight to four, Brent crude near one hundred and twenty dollars per barrel • World's first commercial orbital outpost launches this month
Sections: 00:00 Open 00:45 AI & Tech 10:00 World News 14:00 DTC & Ecommerce 18:00 Markets 21:00 Science
item.itunes:author: Harun

item.title: May 18, 2026 — Nvidia week, Project Glasswing, and the DTC reset
item.description: Nvidia earnings set the tone for the AI trade as the Fed leadership changes hands. Anthropic gates its Mythos Preview model behind Project Glasswing while OpenAI launches its Frontier enterprise platform. Plus, the DTC unit economics shift and the geopolitical risks now moving oil.
item.itunes:author: Harun

item.title: May 17, 2026 — Mythos vs Daybreak, Iran inflation, iOS 26 attribution
item.description: Anthropic's Claude Mythos cybersecurity model faces off against OpenAI Daybreak as the AI arms race accelerates. Markets pulled back Friday on Iran inflation fears and a lukewarm Trump-Xi summit, while iOS 26 fingerprinting changes deliver the biggest DTC attribution disruption since iOS 14.
item.itunes:author: Harun

item.title: May 16, 2026 — Anthropic's 80x growth, Cerebras IPO, Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Anthropic's eighty times quarterly revenue growth forces a compute deal with SpaceXAI's Colossus data center. Cerebras surges sixty-eight percent in the biggest tech IPO since Uber. Markets sell off Friday as the Trump-Xi summit disappoints and Treasury yields spike on Strait of Hormuz tensions.
item.itunes:author: Harun

item.title: May 15, 2026 — Anthropic restricts Mythos, indexes hit records, iOS 26 hits attribution
item.description: Anthropic limits its new Claude Mythos Preview to vetted enterprises over cybersecurity risk. The S&P 500, Nasdaq, and Dow all closed at record highs on 25% earnings growth and the H200 export thaw. iOS 26's fingerprinting protection is materially degrading default Meta and Google attribution for DTC brands.
item.itunes:author: Harun
